Hello, World

2026/6/18 ~ 1 min read #meta #personal

00101010 01101000 01100101 01101100 01101100 01101111

Welcome to untitled-space. This is the first post.

This blog is a collection of thoughts, notes, and experiments. It’s built with Astro and deployed on GitHub Pages.

Why “untitled-space”?

Because everything begins as untitled. A blank canvas. A blinking cursor in an empty file.

What to expect

  • Long-form articles about code, design, and culture
  • Short notes and observations
  • Occasional ASCII art
def greet():
    print("hello, world")

greet()

Thanks for stopping by.
